title: The Ultimate Solopreneur Agent Harness for AI Builders (Claude Code Harness)
summary: Ron Demerit built a "Solopreneur Rig" harness for Claude Code consisting of 16 specialized sub-agents, a product manager orchestrator, and session-locking features for isolated client work. The harness demonstrates three working applications: Canta Conmigo (Spanish learning via music), native macOS Whisper transcription, and Hermit Host (self-hosted Netlify alternative). Dynamic model routing selects Opus, Sonnet, or Haiku based on task requirements.
